notes: Phase 1 (Naxxramas 25, The Obsidian Sanctum, The Eye of Eternity) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins WotLK Classic Arcane Mage Dps gear guide. Rings/Trinkets: the source lists 2-3 ranked options in one row (you equip two) — split here into two named slots, top pick in slot 1; combined source text kept for both. Enchants/gems reused from the matching wotlk/p4 spec profile (same stat priorities apply across phases).

gems.name: Chaotic Skyflare Diamond (+40 crit, +3% crit damage — requires two blue/purple/green gems)
Runed Cardinal Ruby (+23 spellpower) — or Runed Scarlet Ruby (rare); Runed Dragon's Eye/Stormjewel for jewelcrafters
Reckless Ametrine (+16 spellpower / +10 haste) — or Veiled Ametrine (+16 spellpower / +10 hit) if hit-capped
Purified Dreadstone (+10 spellpower / +10 spirit) — or Purified Twilight Opal (rare)
